headline: Woman's Reflection In The Mirror Has A 'Different Personality,' They Have Weekly Meetings
summary: The reflection is 'more confident' and 'gives better advice.' They meet every Sunday.
fullBody: Amanda McMirror has discovered her reflection has a 'different personality.' 'It's more confident than I am,' Amanda said. 'It gives better advice.' They have weekly meetings. 'The reflection tells me what to do,' Amanda said. 'I follow its suggestions.' Her reflection is now her 'life coach.' They are 'working on her confidence.'
